items.prompt: Should a student be free to openly reject a role like “team leader,” “class representative,” or “family peacemaker” if that role no longer matches who they are?

items.prompt: Should a student be free to openly reject a role like “team leader,” “class representative,” or “family peacemaker” if that role no longer matches who they are?
